_publications._publicationTitle: Development of a Novel Biomarker Platform for Profiling Key Protein-Protein Interactions to Predict the Efficacy of BH3-Mimetic Drugs.

_contextSnippet: ...untreated MCF-7 cells or those treated with BCL-2-targeting ABT-199/Venetoclax, BCL-XL-targeting A1155463, or MCL-1-targeting AZD5991 were prepared as FFPE slides, and the pro-survival protein–BIM complexes were stained using PRIMABs...
details: Used for PRIMAB validation in FFPE IHC format, showed disruption of pro-survival protein-BIM complexes when treated with specific BH3-mimetics
